ham.subject: Reminder: Semester Project Submission Deadline
ham.body:
Dear Students,

Just a friendly reminder that the deadline for submitting your semester project is fast approaching. Please ensure that your final report, code repository, and presentation slides are uploaded to the portal by **Friday, 10th May 2026** at 11:59 PM.

If you have any questions or need assistance, feel free to reach out. Kisi bhi query ke liye, let me know.

Best regards,
Professor Sharma
Department of Computer Science
University of Delhi

spam.subject: Urgent: Your Zoom Meeting Invite – Action Required
